text.title: Estimation Calibration Loop Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example: typed inputs → decision tree walk → report artefact → owner sign-off.

step.name: inputs
step.input: - name: engagement-log-acme-2026q1 source: wiki://pm/acme/log-2026q1 - name: rate-card-2026 source: repo://pricing/rate-card-2026.yaml - name: stakeholder-map-acme source: repo://pm/stakeholders/acme.yaml

step.name: decision-tree-walk
step.action: root-question: is the triggering activity recurring ≥1x/cycle? YES → applies-precondition met → branch: stakes high? YES → conclusion ref="r3-named-owner" verdict="apply full Estimation Calibration Loop".

step.name: artefact
step.code: { "artefact_id": "estimation-calibration-loop-2026q2-acme", "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "decision": "Apply Estimation Calibration Loop variant A for Acme engagement starting 2026-06-01.", "rationale": "Acme's 2026Q1 engagement-log shows three recurrences of the triggering activity; rate-card-2026 supplies the loaded cost basis; stakeholder-map-acme provides a single accountable owner. All Applies-If predicates hold; no Skip-If fires.", "inputs_used": [ {"name": "engagement-log-acme-2026q1", "source": "wiki://pm/acme/log-2026q1"}, {"name": "rate-card-2026", "source": "repo://pricing/rate-card-2026.yaml"}, {"name": "stakeholder-map-acme", "source": "repo://pm/stakeholders/acme.yaml"} ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "status": "active" }

step.name: owner-signoff
step.action: Owner reads the artefact, accepts within 5 business days. Refresh trigger queued for 2026-08-23.
